basics.name: Johan Meneses
basics.label: Frontend Developer
basics.summary: Frontend Developer with 5+ years of experience building scalable web applications and responsive email campaigns. Specialized in React, Next.js, and TypeScript for modern product interfaces, and in HTML email development using Braze, Salesforce Marketing Cloud, Stripo, and Email on Acid. Open to remote opportunities with US/EU-based companies.

work.name: Takeoff Media
work.summary:
→ Develop and maintain modern web applications using Next.js, React, and TypeScript, integrating Prismic headless CMS for dynamic content delivery across multiple markets.

→ Execute the end-to-end HTML email development workflow — from design and coding to cross-client testing and deployment — for a global audience of 100,000+ subscribers.

→ Manage responsive email campaigns using Stripo for design, Email on Acid for QA testing, and Braze / Salesforce Marketing Cloud for deployment and automation.

→ Support Vue.js projects across the team's stack, ensuring stability, performance, and long-term maintainability.

📦 Next.js · React · TypeScript · Prismic · HTML Email Development · Stripo · Email on Acid · Braze · Salesforce Marketing Cloud · Vue.js · Git · REST API

work.name: Siesa
work.summary:
→ Developed custom WordPress plugins in PHP to implement tailored features for the support department, eliminating manual processes for 200+ internal users.

→ Integrated internal systems via REST API, automating key data workflows and reducing manual data entry by an estimated 40%.

→ Maintained two high-traffic platforms — a public-facing customer support portal and a company-wide intranet — improving operational efficiency and system reliability for 500+ employees.

📦 PHP · WordPress · MySQL · REST API · JavaScript · HTML · CSS

work.name: GB Media Group
work.summary:
→ Developed fully responsive, cross-browser websites using React, JavaScript, HTML, and CSS for multiple clients, translating complex designs into clean, maintainable code.

→ Designed high-fidelity prototypes and wireframes in Adobe Illustrator, collaborating directly with clients to validate design and requirements before development.

→ Managed the complete deployment lifecycle for 5+ client projects, including domain configuration, SSL certificates, email setup, and ongoing site administration.

→ Built custom features using PHP for backend functionality and dynamic content integration.

📦 React · JavaScript · HTML · CSS · PHP · Adobe Illustrator · Git · Responsive Design · Cross-browser Compatibility

projects.name: Clinic Dentist
projects.description: A complete management system for dental clinics. Streamlines daily operations like patient records, appointment booking, and reports.

projects.name: Studio Models
projects.description: Model agency specializing in talent scouting, professional development and fashion production for national and international clients.

projects.name: GB Media Group
projects.description: Corporate website for a business group offering digital services, focusing on modern UI, fast rendering, and responsive design.

projects.name: Landing Page
projects.description: High-performance landing page for a beauty and personal care distributor, featuring smooth animations and optimized load times.
